title: Mike McConnell
compiled_truth: Mike McConnell is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-06-07), Mike McConnell sent 1561 and received 1381 emails, totalling 2942 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeffrey Shankman](people/jeffrey-shankman) (222), [Cathy Phillips](people/cathy-phillips) (137), [Eric Gonzales](people/eric-gonzales) (69), [John Nowlan](people/john-nowlan) (67), [George Mcclellan](people/george-mcclellan) (66). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, _sent_mail, deleted_items, discussion_threads, enron_global_markets, inbox.
